Author: Fly Sniper
Objectives: Defeat the Knight with a Merfolk (Requires Merfolk).

parameters: Is this where we're meeting to play Code Names?
Steal from the riverfolk they said, it would be easy they said.
Don't they know I'm alergic to Code Names?
I said travel 3! Travel 3! The fish was the assassin!
Swim around all you want, the box of Code Names is mine now.
